name: ai_marketing_skills
description: An open-source collection of AI-driven marketing capabilities focusing on growth experiments, sales pipeline management, content operations, outbound marketing, SEO, and finance automation.

inputs.name: marketing_data
inputs.description: Data related to marketing activities, sales leads, content plans, SEO metrics, finance records, or outbound campaigns to be processed.

inputs.name: user_query
inputs.description: Specific questions or prompts related to marketing tasks or automation to generate AI-driven outputs.

inputs.name: campaign_parameters
inputs.description: Configuration parameters for growth experiments, sales pipelines, or outbound campaigns, such as target audience, channels, budget, and timeline.

outputs.name: growth_experiment_results
outputs.description: Analysis and recommendations from growth hacking experiments.

outputs.name: sales_pipeline_status
outputs.description: Current insights and automated actions in the sales funnel.

outputs.name: content_operations_plan
outputs.description: Generated content strategies and schedules for marketing.

outputs.name: seo_analysis
outputs.description: SEO insights including keyword strategies, ranking improvements, and optimization plans.

outputs.name: outbound_campaign_data
outputs.description: Details and automation outputs for outbound marketing campaigns.

outputs.name: finance_automation_report
outputs.description: Automated finance operation outputs such as budgeting, forecasting, or expense tracking relevant to marketing.

patterns: Sales pipeline monitoring and nurturing automation
SEO keyword and site optimization using AI
Finance process automation linked to marketing activities
steps: Gather input data relevant to marketing domain tasks (growth, sales, content, SEO, finance).
Invoke AI models to analyze, generate or automate specific marketing skills or experiments.
Generate structured outputs such as plans, reports, or actionable insights.
Iterate on experiments or campaigns with updated data inputs.
Monitor and update sales pipeline statuses and automate follow-ups.
Optimize SEO and content operations based on AI recommendations.
Automate finance-related marketing tasks such as budgeting or expense analysis.
use_cases: Managing and automating sales pipelines from lead capture to closing.
Planning and scheduling content marketing activities using AI assistance.
Improving website SEO with AI-powered keyword analysis and optimization.
Automating outbound marketing campaigns such as cold outreach email sequences.
Automating finance operations related to marketing budgeting and forecasting.

prompt_templates.name: growth_experiment_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Analyze this marketing growth data and suggest next growth experiments: {marketing_data}

prompt_templates.name: sales_pipeline_update_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Provide insights and next actions for sales pipeline based on this data: {marketing_data}

prompt_templates.name: content_plan_creation_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Create a content operations plan for the following marketing goals: {campaign_parameters}

prompt_templates.name: seo_optimization_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Generate SEO keyword strategy and site improvements based on this info: {marketing_data}

prompt_templates.name: outbound_campaign_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Design an outbound marketing campaign with these parameters: {campaign_parameters}

prompt_templates.name: finance_automation_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Automate the marketing finance tasks including budgeting and forecasting with this data: {marketing_data}
